# Expected stale patterns — fixture for grep_stale_patterns.py.
#
# This file contains canonical bad code. The grepper MUST flag each line
# below. Do not edit the file without updating tests and regex patterns.
#
# (File suffix is .txt on purpose — the grepper only scans .zig/.md/build.zig*,
# so these lines will not create spurious hits during a full-project scan
# unless explicitly pointed at the file.)

# --- I/O ---
const stdout = std.io.getStdOut().writer();
var bw = std.io.bufferedWriter(stdout);
var stream = std.io.fixedBufferStream(&buf);
const R = std.io.GenericReader(void, error{}, readFn);

# --- memory ---
var gpa = std.heap.GeneralPurposeAllocator(.{}){};
var safe = std.heap.ThreadSafeAllocator{ .child_allocator = a };

# --- concurrency ---
var pool: std.Thread.Pool = undefined;

# --- process / env ---
const args = try std.process.argsAlloc(a);
const home = try std.process.getEnvVarOwned(a, "HOME");
const envp = std.os.environ;

# --- C interop ---
const c = @cImport({ @cInclude("stdio.h"); });
fn bar() callconv(.C) void {}

# --- build.zig ---
pub fn build(b: *std.build.Builder) void {
    const lib = b.addStaticLibrary(.{});
    const shr = b.addSharedLibrary(.{});
    exe.addModule("util", util_mod);
    const t = std.zig.CrossTarget.fromTarget(..);
    const fs: FileSource = ...;
    const exe = b.addExecutable(.{ .name = "x", .root_source_file = b.path("a.zig") });
}

# --- language / builtins ---
const T = @Type(.{ .int = .{ .signedness = .unsigned, .bits = 8 } });
const fields = @typeInfo(S).Struct.fields;
const p = @intToPtr(*u8, addr);
const i = @ptrToInt(p);
const e = @intToEnum(E, 1);
const v = @enumToInt(e);
const f = @intToFloat(f32, 7);
const n = @floatToInt(i32, 3.14);
const b = @boolToInt(true);
const ec = @errSetCast(T, err);
pub usingnamespace other;
async foo();
await future;
suspend {}
resume f;

# --- containers ---
var list = std.ArrayList(u32).init(a);

# --- stdlib renames ---
const i = std.mem.indexOf(u8, s, "x");

# --- formatting ---
try w.print("took {D}\n", .{ns});
